headline.zh-CN: 修复专辑设置保存时清空资料的问题
headline.en: Fixes album metadata being cleared from settings saves

summary.zh-CN: 修复了在专辑设置中只保存部分选项时，简介、发行日期、目录编号、社团名和曲风标签可能被清空的问题。
summary.en: Fixes an issue where saving a partial album setting could clear description, release date, catalog number, circle name, and genre tags.

title.zh-CN: 部分保存不再覆盖专辑资料
title.en: Partial saves no longer overwrite album metadata

description.zh-CN: 保存检查清单模式或源音频补交开关时，系统现在只更新当前提交的设置，不会把未修改的专辑资料写空。
description.en: When saving checklist mode or the source follow-up switch, the system now updates only the submitted setting and preserves unchanged album metadata.
